items.description: An attributed origin-hypothesis classification for an observation.

description: Competing origin claims for an observation (one per evaluator/verdict).

evaluatedAt.description: When this judgement was made (ISO 8601 datetime).

evaluatedBy.description: Who made this judgement — a person, agency, or agent identifier.

rationale.description: Why this judgement was reached — the evaluator's stated reasoning.

evidenceRefs.description: Refs to in-record evidence justifying this claim, e.g. "media:<id>", "sensor:<id>".

primaryHypothesis.description: OCS node id of the primary hypothesis.

confidence.description: Confidence in the primary hypothesis, in [0,1].

alternativeHypotheses.description: Other OCS hypotheses this same evaluator weighs as possible, each with its own confidence — the intra-claim uncertainty axis.

items.description: A weighted origin hypothesis (OCS node + confidence).
